webgl_status: skipped - requires Cocos Creator Dashboard GUI

api_checks.note: Backend not started (curl connection refused on port 3000). Route verified from source: returns { token, player_id, is_new_player, expires_at }. NOTE: field name is 'is_new_player', not 'is_new' — spec updated to reflect this.

Backend not started. Route verified from source: returns { entries: [{ rank, player_id, display_name, total_score, chapter_reached, highest_level, updated_at }], pagination: { page, limit, total_entries, total_pages }, my_rank }. No authentication required.

Backend not started. Route verified from source: requires Bearer JWT; returns { player_id, chapter_progress, currency, materials, boosters, decorations, monthly_card, settings, updated_at }. Player must own the save (403 if mismatched JWT).

No /v1/config endpoint exists in backend (checked all route files: auth.ts, save.ts, leaderboard.ts, iap.ts, server.ts). Game configuration is bundled client-side via LevelLoader.ts. Removed from spec expectations.
Backend not started. Route verified from source at /health (no /v1 prefix): returns { status, version, timestamp, services: { database, iap_apple, iap_google } }.

spec_changes: TC-001 comment block updated to document ice_block obstacle mechanics (ice_block tiles block tile selection but allow path traversal; adjacent matches chip away 1-3 layers) and chapter-gated unlock system (chapters 2-6 lock until prior chapter restoration stage met via ProgressionManager).
Added API contract notes block after URL constants documenting correct field names (is_new_player not is_new), required request bodies, and noting absence of /v1/config endpoint.
TC-005 for romantic subplot NOT added: LeaderboardScene.ts was inspected and contains no 'hinata'/'romantc' references — no romantic subplot scene exists in the current codebase.
findings: Auth response field is 'is_new_player' not 'is_new' — game client should use the correct field name when reading this value.
No /v1/config endpoint exists; game config (level data, obstacle types, economy balancing) is embedded in LevelLoader.ts as static arrays.
Ice block obstacle (ice_block) is fully implemented in ObstacleManager.ts: 1-3 layer variant, adjacent match chips layers, blocks selection but not path traversal.
Chapter-gated unlocks are managed by ProgressionManager.ts tracking completedLevels and restorationStage per chapter.
All 6 chapters (1-6) are referenced in leaderboard and save routes, matching the product vision of 6 chapters from dock to lighthouse.
